adeunis/pulse.name: Pulse - Metering Interface
adeunis/pulse.description: The Adeunis Pulse impulse interface allows connecting up to 2 connectable meters (water, gas, electricity, etc) and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity.

adeunis/pulse-4.name: Pulse 4 / Pulse 4 ATEX - Metering Interface
adeunis/pulse-4.description: The Adeunis Pulse 4 impulse interface allows connecting up to 2 connectable meters (water, gas, electricity, etc) and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity.

adeunis/analog.name: Analog - Sensor Interface
adeunis/analog.description: The Adeunis Analog has 2 inputs for connecting 0-10 V or 4-20 mA sensors and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity to industrial analog/analog PWM sensors already installed on the production sites.

adeunis/dry-contact.name: Dry Contact - I/O Interface
adeunis/dry-contact.description: The Adeunis Dry Contact has 4 configurable inputs/outputs for connecting sensors (E.g. contact sensor, double level sensor, water leak spot, or water leak cable) and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity. It reports 0-1 states and controls relays.

adeunis/dry-contacts-2.name: Dry Contact 2 - I/O Interface
adeunis/dry-contacts-2.description: The Adeunis Dry Contact 2 has 4 configurable inputs/outputs for connecting sensors (E.g. contact sensor, double level sensor, water leak spot, or water leak cable) and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity. It reports 0-1 states and controls relays.

adeunis/ftd-network-tester.name: FTD Network Tester
adeunis/ftd-network-tester.description: The Adeunis FTD (Field Test Device) is a LoRaWAN® network tester that consists of a GPS receiver and a temperature sensor. It checks network coverages and chooses the most appropriate network for ensuring the good positioning of end devices.

adeunis/modbus.name: Modbus - Modbus Interface
adeunis/modbus.description: The Adeunis Modbus provides an interface for Modbus slave devices to connect with LoRaWAN® networks. It is compatible with RS485/RS232 and provides supervision of up to 20 slaves.

adeunis/temp.name: Temp - Temperature Probe
adeunis/temp.description: The Adeunis Temp is a LoRaWAN® device that supports integrated and remote temperature probes for measuring and monitoring temperature in indoor and outdoor environments.

adeunis/temp-4.name: Temp 4 / Temp 2S 4 IP68 - Temperature Probe
adeunis/temp-4.description: The Adeunis Temp 4 is a LoRaWAN® device that supports integrated and remote temperature probes for measuring and monitoring temperature in indoor and outdoor environments.

adeunis/breath.name: Breath - Indoor Air Quality Sensor
adeunis/breath.description: The Adeunis Breath has several functions (PM1, PM2.5, PM10 and VOCT, alert button, dry contact input) optimising comfort, and ensuring the health of occupants.

adeunis/comfort.name: Comfort - Temperature & Humidity Sensor
adeunis/comfort.description: The Adeunis Comfort has several functions (temperature, humidity, alert button, dry contact input) optimizing occupant comfort and energy performance in a building.

adeunis/comfort-co2.name: Comfort CO2 - Indoor Air Quality Sensor
adeunis/comfort-co2.description: The Adeunis Comfort CO2 has several functions (CO2, temperature, humidity, alert button, dry contact input) optimizing occupant comfort and energy performance in a building.

adeunis/deltap.name: Delta P - Air Pressure Delta Monitor
adeunis/deltap.description: The Adeunis Delta P monitors the operation of a ventilation unit, air handling unit or air network of a building, provides LoRaWAN® connectivity.

adeunis/motion.name: Motion - Motion Sensor
adeunis/motion.description: The Adeunis Motion has several functions (presence, luminosity, alert button, dry contact input) optimizing the comfort of occupants and the energy consumption of a building, and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity.

adeunis/pulse-nb-iot.name: Pulse 4 NB-IoT - Metering Interface
adeunis/pulse-nb-iot.description: The Adeunis Pulse impulse interface allows connecting up to 2 connectable meters (water, gas, electricity, etc) and provides LoRaWAN® connectivity.

adeunis/repeater.name: Repeater Sigfox - Range Extender
adeunis/repeater.description: The Adeunis Sigfox Repeater Exxtend the range of the SIGFOX RC1 network

adeunis/tic-cbe-linky-mono.name: TIC CBE/LINKY MONO - Electricity Meter Interface
adeunis/tic-cbe-linky-mono.description: The Adeunis Tic has an interface compatible with any type of TIC, PME-PMI and Linky electricity meter.

adeunis/tic-cbe-linky-tri.name: TIC CBE/LINKY TRI - Electricity Meter Interface
adeunis/tic-cbe-linky-tri.description: The Adeunis Tic has an interface compatible with any type of TIC, PME-PMI and Linky electricity meter.

adeunis/tic-pme-pmi.name: TIC PME-PMI - Electricity Meter Interface
adeunis/tic-pme-pmi.description: The Adeunis Tic has an interface compatible with any type of TIC, PME-PMI and Linky electricity meter.

browan/tbhh100.name: Temperature & Humidity Sensor
browan/tbhh100.description: The Browan Temperature & Humidity Sensor integrates temperature and humidity sensors for measuring indoor environments. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data and is suitable for use with consumer or facility management applications.

browan/tbdw100.name: Door/Window Sensor
browan/tbdw100.description: The Browan Door/Window sensor integrates a hall-effect sensor for detecting the opening and closing of doors, windows, garage doors, vaults, and entryways. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

browan/tbms100.name: Motion Sensor
browan/tbms100.description: The Browan Motion Sensor integrates dual passive infrared detectors and the fresnel lens provides a 7m detection range. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data and is suitable for facility management systems to optimize facility usage or cleanliness for desks, conference rooms, bathrooms, etc.

browan/tbam100.name: Ambient Light Sensor
browan/tbam100.description: The Browan Ambient Light Sensor integrates an optical sensor providing measurements of ambient light intensity which matches the human eye’s response to light under a variety of lighting conditions. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

browan/tbsl100.name: Sound Level Sensor
browan/tbsl100.description: The Browan Sound Level Sensor integrates a MEMS microphone for measuring sound levels in decibels (dBA). It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data and is suitable for use in a variety of building environments.

browan/tbwl100.name: Water Leak Sensor
browan/tbwl100.description: The Browan Water Leak Sensor is combined with temperature, humidity, and water leak detection sensors. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to send an uplink notification when a water leak is detected.

browan/tbpb100.name: Push Button
browan/tbpb100.description: The Tabs Push Button with two buttons.

browan/tbhv110.name: IAQ Sensor
browan/tbhv110.description: The Browan IAQ Sensor integrates an indoor air quality sensor (IAQ) for measuring relative humidity, barometric pressure, ambient temperature, and gas (VOC) in indoor environments such as rooms and buildings. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

browan/cd10.name: MerryIoT Air Quality CO2
browan/cd10.description: The MerryIoT Air Quality CO2 is designed for in-home and in-building usage for consumer or facility management applications. The design is optimized for high-volume manufacturing, optimal battery lifetime, and pleasing aesthetics for in-building placement.

browan/l0010.name: Gasmatic Sensor
browan/l0010.description: Gasmatic Sensor is designed for in-home and in-building usage for consumer or facility management applications. The design is optimized for high-volume manufacturing, optimal battery lifetime, and pleasing aesthetics for in-building placement.

decentlab/dl-5tm.name: DL-5TM - Legacy Soil Moisture and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-5tm.description: The Decentlab DL-5TM is equipped with a legacy soil moisture and a temperature sensor. Suitable for applications such as irrigation control, smart agriculture, parks, and golf courses.

decentlab/dl-alb.name: DL-ALB - Albedometer Sensor
decentlab/dl-alb.description: The Decentlab DL-ALB is an albedometer sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as solar panel arrays, incoming and reflected shortwave radiation measurement, agricultural measurements, and ecological and hydrological weather networks.

decentlab/dl-atm22.name: DL-ATM22 - Wind Speed, Wind Direction and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-atm22.description: The Decentlab DL-ATM22 consists of wind speed, wind gust, wind direction, tilt, and temperature sensors. It is suitable for smart agriculture, urban heat islands, and building automation.

decentlab/dl-atm41.name: DL-ATM41 - Eleven Parameter Weather Station
decentlab/dl-atm41.description: The Decentlab DL-ATM41 consists of solar radiation, precipitation, vapor pressure, barometric pressure, humidity, temperature, horizontal wind speed, wind gust, wind direction, tilt, and lighting sensors. It is suitable for smart agriculture, urban heat islands, frost alarming, microclimate, and building automation.

decentlab/dl-atm41g2.name: DL-ATM41G2 - Eleven Parameter Weather Station
decentlab/dl-atm41g2.description: The Decentlab DL-ATM41G2 consists of solar radiation, precipitation, vapor pressure, barometric pressure, humidity, temperature, wind speed, wind direction, tilt, and lighting sensors. It is suitable for smart agriculture, urban heat islands, frost alarming, microclimate, and building automation.

decentlab/dl-blg.name: DL-BLG - Black Globe Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-blg.description: The Decentlab DL-BLG is equipped with a black globe temperature sensor. It is suitable for use in workplace safety, heat stress measurement, WBGT calculation for heat stress and meteorology.

decentlab/dl-ctd10.name: DL-CTD10 - Pressure / Liquid Level, Temperature and Electrical Conductivity Sensor
decentlab/dl-ctd10.description: The Decentlab DL-CTD10 consists of pressure/liquid level, temperature, and electrical conductivity sensors. It is suitable for use in monitoring level/depth and water quality in tanks for liquids, groundwater and wells, running or open water level and quality, and salinity and chloride monitoring.

decentlab/dl-cws.name: DL-CWS - High-Precision Winter Road Maintenance Sensor
decentlab/dl-cws.description: The Decentlab DL-CWS includes a high-precision infrared pyrometer, temperature, humidity and dew point sensors. It is suitable for use in road weather information systems, winter road maintenance, frost alarming, ice alerting, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-cws2.name: DL-CWS2 - High-Precision Winter Road Maintenance Sensor with Radiation Shield
decentlab/dl-cws2.description: The Decentlab DL-CWS2 includes a high-precision infrared pyrometer, temperature, humidity and dew point sensors. It is suitable for use in road weather information systems, winter road maintenance, frost alarming, ice alerting, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-002.name: DL-DLR2-002 - Pulse Counter Dry Contact Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-002.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-002 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of a Pulse Counter Dry Contact sensor interface.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-003.name: DL-DLR2-003 - Digital Input Dry Contact Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-003.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-003 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of a Digital Input Dry Contact sensor interface.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-004.name: DL-DLR2-004 - Analog 4 … 20 mA Sensor Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-004.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-004 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of an Analog 4 … 20 mA Sensor.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-005.name: DL-DLR2-005 - Analog 0 … 3 V Sensor Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-005.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-005 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of an Analog 0 … 3 V  Sensor.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-006.name: DL-DLR2-006 - Analog Potentiometer Sensor Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-006.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-006 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of an Analog Potentiometer Sensor.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-008.name: DL-DLR2-008 - Analog PT100 Sensor Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-008.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-008 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of an Analog PT100 Sensor.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-009.name: DL-DLR2-009 - Analog PT1000 Sensor Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-009.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-009 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of an Analog PT1000 Sensor.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-010.name: DL-DLR2-010 - Dual Pulse Counter Dry Contact Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-010.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-010 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of a Dual Pulse Counter Dry Contact sensor interface.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-011.name: DL-DLR2-011 - Dual Digital Input Dry Contact Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-011.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-011 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of a Dual Digital Input Dry Contact sensor interface.

decentlab/dl-dlr2-012.name: DL-DLR2-012 - Analog Strain Gauge Sensor Transmitter
decentlab/dl-dlr2-012.description: The Decentlab DL-DLR2-012 is an Analog or Digital Sensor Device for LoRaWAN® that consists of an Analog Strain Gauge Sensor.

decentlab/dl-ds18.name: DL-DS18 - Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-ds18.description: The Decentlab DL-DS18 is equipped with a temperature sensor for measuring temperature. Suitable for applications such as outdoor remote monitoring, cold chain, storage, building automation, smart agriculture, open water, and tank temperature, etc.

decentlab/dl-dws.name: DL-DWS - Weighing Scale
decentlab/dl-dws.description: The Decentlab DL-DWS is a weighing scale for LoRaWAN® that comes with a 'vibrating wire for weight' sensor. Suitable for applications such as logistics, inventory, and weighing.

decentlab/dl-gmm.name: DL-GMM - Greenhouse Multi Monitor
decentlab/dl-gmm.description: The Decentlab DL-GMM includes a Photosynthetically Active Radiation (PAR), temperature, humidity, barometric pressure and CO2 sensors for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as smart agriculture, greenhouses, grow rooms, and vertical farms.

decentlab/dl-iam.name: DL-IAM - Indoor Ambiance Monitor including CO₂, TVOC and Motion Sensor
decentlab/dl-iam.description: The Decentlab DL-IAM (Indoor Ambiance Monitor) is a LoRaWAN® end device that consists of a CO2 sensor, TVOC sensor, temperature sensor, humidity sensor, barometric pressure sensor, ambient light intensity sensor, and PIR motion sensor. Suitable for building automation, activity and visitor frequency monitoring, energy and HVAC optimization, shop and workplace comfort enhancement.

decentlab/dl-ifd.name: DL-IFD - Fruit Dendrometer Sensor
decentlab/dl-ifd.description: The Decentlab DL-IFD is a fruit dendrometer sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as outdoor remote monitoring, irrigation control, field monitoring, smart agriculture and scientific research.

decentlab/dl-ilt.name: DL-ILT - Leaf Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-ilt.description: The Decentlab DL-ILT is a leaf temperature sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as outdoor remote monitoring, irrigation control, field monitoring, smart agriculture and scientific research.

decentlab/dl-isd.name: DL-ISD - Stem Dendrometer Sensor
decentlab/dl-isd.description: The Decentlab DL-ISD is a stem dendrometer sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as outdoor remote monitoring, irrigation control, field monitoring, smart agriculture and scientific research.

decentlab/dl-isf.name: DL-ISF - Sapflow Sensor
decentlab/dl-isf.description: The Decentlab DL-ISF is a sap flow sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as plant physiology, plant water use, hydraulic redistribution, hydrology, and irrigation scheduling.

decentlab/dl-itst.name: DL-ITST - Infrared Thermometer / Surface Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-itst.description: The Decentlab DL-ITST is equipped with an infrared pyrometer (thermometer) for measuring surface temperature. Ideal for road surface monitoring, ice warning, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-kl66.name: DL-KL66 - Strain / Weight Sensor
decentlab/dl-kl66.description: The Decentlab DL-KL66 is equipped with a vibrating wire that works as a strain/ weight sensor for measuring strain and weight. Suitable for monitoring silo fill level, structural health, weighing, component deformation and strain, and cracks.

decentlab/dl-lid.name: DL-LID - Laser Distance / Level Sensor
decentlab/dl-lid.description: The Decentlab DL-LID is equipped with a distance/level sensor for measuring distance. Suitable for generic ranging and proximity monitoring, snow level monitoring, water level monitoring, and flood monitoring.

decentlab/dl-lp8p.name: DL-LP8P - CO₂, Temperature, Humidity and Barometric Pressure Sensor
decentlab/dl-lp8p.description: The Decentlab DL-LP8P is a LoRaWAN® end device equipped with CO₂, temperature, humidity, and barometric pressure sensors. Suitable for applications such as goods and storage condition monitoring, indoor and outdoor air quality, building automation, energy-saving, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-lpw.name: DL-LPW - Linear Position / Way
decentlab/dl-lpw.description: The Decentlab DL-LPW is a linear position sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as crack measurements, displacement monitoring, terrain changes, environmental changes, structural health monitoring, and bearings.

decentlab/dl-lws.name: DL-LWS - Leaf Wetness Sensor
decentlab/dl-lws.description: The Decentlab DL-LWS is a LoRaWAN® end device equipped with leaf wetness sensor. Suitable for applications such as outdoor remote monitoring, plant disease and infection prevention, greenhouse and soil-less plantations, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-mbx.name: DL-MBX - Ultrasonic Distance / Level Sensor
decentlab/dl-mbx.description: The Decentlab DL-MBX is equipped with an ultrasonic distance/level sensor for measuring distance. Suitable for monitoring water level, flood, snow level, silo level, etc.

decentlab/dl-mes5.name: DL-MES5 - Large-Range Optical Turbidity and Temperature Sensor For LoRaWAN
decentlab/dl-mes5.description: The Decentlab DL-MES5 is an optical turbidity sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as urban waste water treatment, treatment of industrial effluents, sludge treatment, and dredging site.

decentlab/dl-ntu.name: DL-NTU - Optical Turbidity and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-ntu.description: The Decentlab DL-NTU is equipped with optical infrared turbidity and temperature sensors for water quality monitoring.

decentlab/dl-optod.name: DL-OPTOD - Optical Dissolved Oxygen and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-optod.description: The Decentlab DL-OPTOD consists of dissolved oxygen and temperature sensors. It is suitable for use in wastewater treatment, industrial effluent treatment, open water monitoring, fish farming, aquarium, and drinking water monitoring.

decentlab/dl-par.name: DL-PAR - Photosynthetically Active Radiation Sensor
decentlab/dl-par.description: The Decentlab DL-PAR consists of a Photosynthetically Active Radiation (PAR) sensor for measuring the amount of light available for photosynthesis. It is suitable for use in outdoor environments, greenhouses, and growth chambers.

decentlab/dl-pheht.name: DL-PHEHT - pH, ORP and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-pheht.description: The Decentlab DL-PHEHT is a water ph sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as industrial and municipal sewage treatment plants, wastewater management (nitrification and de-nitrification), surface water monitoring, and drinking water monitoring.

decentlab/dl-pm.name: DL-PM - Particulate Matter, Temperature, Humidity and Barometric Pressure Sensor
decentlab/dl-pm.description: The Decentlab DL-PM is equipped with PM1, PM2.5, PM4, PM10, temperature, humidity, and barometric pressure sensors for air quality and environmental monitoring.

decentlab/dl-pr21.name: DL-PR21 - Pressure / Liquid Level and Temperature Sensor with G1/4" Pipe Thread
decentlab/dl-pr21.description: The Decentlab DL-PR21 is equipped with pressure, liquid level, and temperature sensors. It is suitable for use with water distribution systems for measuring and monitoring liquid levels, temperature, and leaks.

decentlab/dl-pr26.name: DL-PR26 - Pressure / Liquid Level and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-pr26.description: The Decentlab DL-PR26 consists of a pressure/liquid level sensor and a temperature sensor. It is made for measuring and monitoring liquid levels and pressure in tanks, wells, groundwater, boreholes, and also leak detection, and pump monitoring.

decentlab/dl-pr36.name: DL-PR36 - High-Precision Pressure / Liquid Level and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-pr36.description: The Decentlab DL-PR36 is a LoRaWAN® end-device that is equipped with a high precision pressure/liquid level sensor and a temperature sensor. Suitable for measuring water/liquid levels in tanks, wells, boreholes, groundwater, etc.

decentlab/dl-pr36ctd.name: DL-PR36CTD - High-Precision Pressure / Liquid Level, Temperature and Electrical Conductivity Sensor
decentlab/dl-pr36ctd.description: The Decentlab DL-PR36CTD includes pressure, temperature, and electrical conductivity sensors. It is suitable for measuring water levels and monitoring water quality, salinity, and chloride.

decentlab/dl-pyr.name: DL-PYR - Total Solar Radiation Sensor
decentlab/dl-pyr.description: The Decentlab DL-PYR consists of a solar radiation sensor for measuring solar radiation. It is suitable for measuring radiations in solar panel arrays, smart agriculture, and building automation.

decentlab/dl-rad.name: DL-RAD - Radar Distance / Level Sensor
decentlab/dl-rad.description: The Decentlab DL-RAD is a radar distance/level sensor for measuring distance. It is suitable for monitoring generic ranging, proximity, level, water level, flood monitoring, etc.

decentlab/dl-rhc.name: DL-RHC - High-Precision Air Temperature and Humidity Sensor with Radiation Shield
decentlab/dl-rhc.description: The Decentlab DL-RCH is equipped with high-precision air temperature and humidity sensors for environmental monitoring. Suitable for smart agriculture, urban heat islands, greenhouses, frost alarming, and building automation.

decentlab/dl-sdd.name: DL-SDD - Soil Moisture, Temperature and Salinity Profile For LoRaWAN
decentlab/dl-sdd.description: The Decentlab DL-SDD includes 6 soil moisture, temperature and salinity sensors for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as outdoor remote monitoring, irrigation control, smart agriculture, greenhouse and soil-less plantations, parks, and golf courses.

decentlab/dl-sht35-001.name: DL-SHT35-001 - Air Temperature and Humidity Sensor with Radiation Shield
decentlab/dl-sht35-001.description: The Decentlab DL-SHT35-001 is equipped with a temperature and a humidity sensor that can be used for monitoring and measuring air temperature and humidity. Suitable for applications such as smart agriculture, urban heat islands, greenhouses, frost alarming, and building automation.

decentlab/dl-sht35-002.name: DL-SHT35-002 - Air Temperature and Humidity Sensor with Radiation Shield
decentlab/dl-sht35-002.description: The Decentlab DL-SHT35-002 is equipped with a temperature and humidity sensor for environmental monitoring. Suitable for cold chain, storage, building automation, smart agriculture applications.

decentlab/dl-smtp.name: DL-SMTP - Soil Moisture and Temperature Profile
decentlab/dl-smtp.description: The Decentlab DL-SMTP consists of soil moisture and temperature sensors. It is suitable for irrigation control, smart agriculture, greenhouse and soilless plantations, parks, and golf courses.

decentlab/dl-tbrg.name: DL-TBRG - Tipping Bucket Rain Gauge
decentlab/dl-tbrg.description: The Decentlab DL-TBRG consists of a precipitation sensor for measuring rainfall. It is suitable for precipitation and weather monitoring, flood monitoring, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-tp.name: DL-TP - Temperature Profile
decentlab/dl-tp.description: The Decentlab DL-TP comes with temperature profiling sensors that can be used in monitoring of glaciers, lakes, ocean, permafrost, dike, dam and soils.

decentlab/dl-trs11.name: DL-TRS11 - Soil Moisture, Temperature and Electrical Conductivity Sensor
decentlab/dl-trs11.description: The Decentlab DL-TRS11 includes a volumetric water content (VWC), temperature, and dielectric permittivity sensor. It is suitable for irrigation control, smart agriculture, greenhouse and soilless plantations, parks, and golf courses.

decentlab/dl-trs12.name: DL-TRS12 - Soil Moisture, Temperature and Electrical Conductivity Sensor
decentlab/dl-trs12.description: The Decentlab DL-TRS12 includes a volumetric water content (VWC), temperature, and dielectric permittivity sensor. It is suitable for irrigation control, smart agriculture, greenhouse and soilless plantations, parks, and golf courses.

decentlab/dl-trs21.name: DL-TRS21 - Soil Water Potential and Temperature Sensor
decentlab/dl-trs21.description: The Decentlab DL-TRS21 is a soil water potential and temperature sensor for LoRaWAN®. Suitable for applications such as irrigation control, smart agriculture, parks, and golf courses.

decentlab/dl-wrm.name: DL-WRM - Winter Road Maintenance Sensor
decentlab/dl-wrm.description: The Decentlab DL-WRM includes an infrared pyrometer, temperature, and humidity sensors. It is suitable for use in winter road maintenance, frost alarming, ice alerting, and smart agriculture.

decentlab/dl-zn1.name: DL-ZN1 - Dendrometer
decentlab/dl-zn1.description: The Decentlab DL-ZN1 comes with a linear position dendrometer that can measure the growth of plants and trees. It is suitable for use in irrigation control, smart agriculture, forestry, plantation, and ecophysiology applications.

decentlab/dl-zn2.name: DL-ZN2 - Dual Dendrometer
decentlab/dl-zn2.description: The Decentlab DL-ZN2 comes with a linear position dendrometer that can measure the growth of plants and trees. It is suitable for use in irrigation control, smart agriculture, forestry, plantation, and ecophysiology.

dragino/rs485-ln.name: RS485-LN - RS485 to LoRaWAN®
dragino/rs485-ln.description: The Dragino RS485-LN is an RS485 to LoRaWAN® converter. It allows the RS485 devices to use LoRaWAN wireless protocol which simplifies the IoT installation and reduces the installation/maintaining cost.

dragino/rs485-bl.name: RS485-BL - RS485 / UART to LoRaWAN®
dragino/rs485-bl.description: The Dragino RS485-BL is an RS485 / UART to LoRaWAN® converter that provides interfaces to connect RS485 sensors, 3.3v/5v UART sensors, and interrupt sensors. The measured data is sent to a LoRaWAN network. Ideal for wireless alarm and security systems, home and building automation, automated meter reading, industrial monitoring and control, long-range irrigation systems, etc.

dragino/lsn50v2-s31.name: LSN50v2-S31 - Temperature & Humidity Sensor
dragino/lsn50v2-s31.description: The Dragino LSN50v2-S31 consists of a temperature and humidity sensor for measuring the temperature and humidity in the surrounding environment. The measured data is then uploaded to the IoT server via LoRaWAN® wireless protocol. It can be used with home and building automation, industrial monitoring and control, and irrigation systems.

dragino/lsn50v2-d20.name: LSN50v2-D20 - Temperature Sensor
dragino/lsn50v2-d20.description: The Dragino LSN50v2-D20 consists of a temperature sensor for measuring the temperature of the air, liquid, or any object, and then uploaded to the IoT server via LoRaWAN® wireless protocol. It can be used with home and building automation, industrial monitoring and control, and irrigation systems.

dragino/ldds20.name: LDDS20 - Liquid Level Sensor
dragino/ldds20.description: The Dragino LDDS20 consists of an ultrasonic liquid level sensor for measuring liquid levels. It uses a non-contact method to measure the height of liquid in a container without opening the container. The measured liquid levels are sent to a LoRaWAN® network for further analysis.

dragino/ldds75.name: LDDS75 - Distance Sensor
dragino/ldds75.description: The Dragino LDDS75 consists of an ultrasonic detection sensor for measuring the distance between the sensor and a flat object. It is used to measure the distance between the sensor and a flat object. It uses temperature compensation to improve the reliability of data. The measured distance data are sent to a LoRaWAN® network for further analysis.

dragino/lbt1.name: LBT1 - Bluetooth Tracker
dragino/lbt1.description: The Dragino LBT1 is a LoRaWAN® Bluetooth tracker that consists of a motion sensor and an iBeacon scanner. LBT1 scans and finds the nearest i-Beacon info and sends it to an IoT server via LoRaWAN wireless network.

dragino/lse01.name: LSE01 - Soil Moisture & EC Sensor
dragino/lse01.description: The Dragino LSE01 consists of soil moisture, soil temperature, and soil conductivity sensors. It is suitable for smart agriculture applications. The measured data is sent to the LoRaWAN® network.

dragino/lwl01.name: LWL01 - Water Leak Sensor
dragino/lwl01.description: The Dragino LWL01 consists of a water leak sensor that detects the water leak status and sends it to the LoRaWAN® network. Suitable for wireless alarm and security systems, home and building automation, industrial monitoring and control, and much more.

dragino/lds01.name: LDS01 - Door Sensor
dragino/lds01.description: The Dragino LDS01 consists of a magnetic sensor for detecting the opening and closing of doors, windows, garage doors, vaults, and entryways. The sensor sends a data packet on each open/close event to a LoRaWAN®network server.

dragino/lgt92.name: LGT92 - GPS Location Tracker
dragino/lgt92.description: The Dragino LGT-92 LoRaWAN® GPS Tracker includes a low-power GPS module for location tracking and a 9-axis accelerometer for motion detection. The captured data is sent to a LoRaWAN network for analysis.

dragino/lt22222-l.name: LT22222-L - I/O Controller
dragino/lt22222-l.description: The Dragino LT22222-L is a LoRaWAN® I/O module that contains different I/O Interfaces such as analog current input, analog voltage input, relay output, digital input, and digital output. The LT series I/O modules are designed to simplify the installation of I/O monitoring.

dragino/lt33222-l.name: LT33222-L - I/O Controller
dragino/lt33222-l.description: The Dragino LT33222-L is a LoRaWAN® I/O module that contains different I/O Interfaces such as analog current input, analog voltage input, relay output, digital input, and digital output. The LT series I/O modules are designed to simplify the installation of I/O monitoring.

dragino/lsn50-v2.name: LSN50-V2 - Sensor Node
dragino/lsn50-v2.description: The Dragino LSN50-V2 is a LoRaWAN® end device that allows connecting various external sensors, for example, a temperature sensor probe. It can be used with many applications such as wireless alarm and security systems, home and building automation, automated meter reading, industrial monitoring, and control, and irrigation systems.

dragino/cpl01.name: CPL01 - Dry Contact Sensor
dragino/cpl01.description: CPL01 -- Outdoor LoRaWAN Open/Close Dry Contact Sensor

dragino/lmds200.name: LMDS200 - Microwave Radar Distance Sensor
dragino/lmds200.description: LMDS200 LoRaWAN Microwave Radar Distance Detection Sensor

dragino/wsc1-l.name: WSC1-L - Weather Station Process Unit
dragino/wsc1-l.description: WSC1-L is the main process unit in Dragino Weather Station solution.

dragino/lht52.name: LHT52 - Temperature & Humidity Sensor
dragino/lht52.description: LHT52 indoor LoRaWAN Temperature & Humidity Sensor

dragino/trackerd.name: TrackerD - GPS Tracker
dragino/trackerd.description: The Dragino TrackerD consists of a LoRaWAN tracker based on ESP32 MCU and Semtech LoRa Wireless Chip. It features various sensors and functions such as GPS, WiFi, BLE, temperature, humidity, motion detection, alarm button and a buzzer.

dragino/lwl03a.name: LWL03A - None-Position Rope Type Water Leak Controller
dragino/lwl03a.description: The Dragino LWL03A is a LoRaWAN None-Position Rope Type Water Leak Controller. User can lay the LWL03A + Water Leak Cable on the ground to detect water leakage.

elsys/ers.name: ERS smart building sensor
elsys/ers.description: The ELSYS ERS is a LoRaWAN® device that consists of motion, temperature, humidity, and light sensors for measuring occupancy and the indoor environment.  It is suitable for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, workplace statistics, facility management, and room occupancy.

elsys/ers-co2.name: ERS CO2 advanced indoor environment
elsys/ers-co2.description: The ELSYS ERS CO2 is a LoRaWAN® device that has internal sensors for measuring temperature, humidity, light, motion, and CO2 level. It can be used for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, and room occupancy measuring.

elsys/ers-co2-lite.name: ERS CO2 Lite indoor co2 monitoring
elsys/ers-co2-lite.description: The ELSYS ERS CO2 Lite is a LoRaWAN® device that has internal sensors for measuring temperature, humidity, and CO2 level. It can be used for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, and workplace management.

elsys/ers-voc.name: ERS VOC indoor air quality
elsys/ers-voc.description: The ELSYS ERS VOC is a LoRaWAN® device that has internal sensors for measuring VOC levels, temperature, humidity, light, and motion (PIR). It can be used for presence monitor systems and is ideal for workplace management.

elsys/ers-eye.name: ERS EYE for advanced indoor and occupancy monitoring
elsys/ers-eye.description: The ELSYS ERS Eye is a LoRaWAN® device that consists of motion, temperature, humidity, and light sensors for measuring occupancy and the indoor environment.  It is suitable for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, workplace statistics, facility management, and room occupancy.

elsys/ers-sound.name: ERS SOUND indoor environment sensor
elsys/ers-sound.description: The ELSYS ERS Sound is an advanced indoor environment LoRaWAN® sensor that consists of temperature, humidity, light, motion, and sound sensors. It is suitable for indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, room occupancy, sound level control in public spaces, schools, libraries, etc.

elsys/ers-lite.name: ERS Lite indoor environment monitoring
elsys/ers-lite.description: The ELSYS ERS Lite is an indoor LoRaWAN® room sensor that contains two internal sensors for measuring indoor temperature and humidity. It is suitable for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, and workplace management.

elsys/elt-2.name: ELT-2 LoRaWAN wireless sensor
elsys/elt-2.description: The ELSYS ELT Ultrasonic is a LoRaWAN® end device that has sensors for measuring distance, temperature, humidity, and atmospheric pressure. It is the ideal sensor for measuring in advanced places or extreme weather conditions.

elsys/elt-lite.name: ELT Lite an easy but powerful LoRAWAN device for measuring analog or digital signals.
elsys/elt-lite.description: The ELSYS ELT Lite is a general LoRaWAN® device for measuring analog or digital signals. It is a 1-channel GPIO wireless transceiver and can also provide power to external sensors. ELT Lite is suitable for applications such as smart cities, agriculture, and distance measuring.

elsys/elt-ultrasonic.name: ELT Ultrasonic LoRaWAN Distance Sensor
elsys/elt-ultrasonic.description: The ELT Ultrasonic is designed for measuring the distance. It can be placed in various environments and can work as a bin level sensor, tank level sensor, or water level under bridges, for example.

elsys/ems.name: EMS - mini sensor
elsys/ems.description: The ELSYS EMS Mini is equipped with temperature, humidity, accelerometer, door switch (reed switch), and water leak sensors. It is suitable for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, water leakage detection, door activity detection, and movement detection. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

elsys/ems-door.name: EMS DOOR but more than just doors
elsys/ems-door.description: The ELSYS EMS Door is equipped with a door switch (reed switch) for detecting the opening and closing of doors, windows, garage doors, vaults, and entryways. It also includes an accelerometer for movement detection. The EMS Door is suitable for applications such as door activity detection, movement detection, smart buildings, and workplace management. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

elsys/ems-lite.name: EMS Lite Small but powerful
elsys/ems-lite.description: The ELSYS EMS Lite is equipped with a temperature and humidity sensor for indoor environmental monitoring. It also includes a leak sensor for detecting water leakage. The EMS Lite is suitable for applications such as indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, and water leakage detection. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

elsys/ems-desk.name: EMS Desk a small sensor for monitoring occupancy
elsys/ems-desk.description: The ELSYS EMS Desk is equipped with a body heat sensor (thermopile) for detecting desk occupancy. It also includes a temperature sensor, humidity sensor (for indoor environment monitoring), and accelerometer (for movement detection). The EMS Desk is suitable for applications such as occupancy detection, indoor environment measuring, smart buildings, workplace management, and movement detection. It utilizes LoRaWAN® connectivity to transmit data.

mclimate/t-valve.name: T-Valve - Water valve
mclimate/t-valve.description: The MClimate T-Valve is a LoRaWAN® water valve equipped with water temperature, ambient temperature, magnetic, flood, and box tampering sensors. It can be used in residential or commercial buildings.

mclimate/flood-sensor.name: Flood Sensor
mclimate/flood-sensor.description: The MClimate Flood Sensor contains a flood sensor for detecting floods and water leakage in residential and commercial buildings. In addition to that, the MClimate flood sensor contains a device tampering detection sensor and a temperature sensor. When a flood or fraud is detected an uplink containing the desired values is transferred to the LoRaWAN® network.

mclimate/vicki.name: Vicki - Smart Radiator Thermostat
mclimate/vicki.description: The MClimate Vicki is a smart radiator thermostat valve that contains a temperature and humidity sensor allowing for temperature control and monitoring temperature and humidity from distance through a LoRaWAN® network. Manual target temperature selection is possible by rotating the outer ring of the device. The target temperature is displayed on the device.

mclimate/ht-sensor.name: Humidity and Temperature Sensor
mclimate/ht-sensor.description: The MClimate HT LoRaWAN® Sensor is an indoor temperature and humidity sensor with 10+ years of battery life ideal for monitoring environments in residential and commercial buildings.

mclimate/co2-sensor.name: CO2 Sensor and Notifier
mclimate/co2-sensor.description: MClimate CO2 Sensor and Notifier is a device that uses NDIR technology to measure the actual CO2 and has built in temperature and humidity sensors. The device also has acoustic and visual notification abilities to indicate occupants whether a room should be ventilated.

mclimate/mc-button.name: Multipurpose Button
mclimate/mc-button.description: MClimate Multipurpose Button LoRaWAN is a simple device with many applications. Featuring a single button with 3 types of clicks and a temperature sensor, only your imagination limits what happens when the customer presses the button.

mclimate/open-close.name: Open/Close Sensor
mclimate/open-close.description: MClimate Open/Close Sensor LoRaWAN® is a device detecting the event of opening or closing windows, doors, cabinets and more. It features long battery life, LED, temperature sensor and a button that triggers an uplink. The device sends an uplink for every event of opening/closing and keeps an internal counter of the total number of events.

mclimate/wireless-thermostat.name: Wireless Thermostat
mclimate/wireless-thermostat.description: MClimate Wireless Thermostat is a stand-alone thermostat powered entirely by solar energy using an organic solar panel. The device features a 2.9" e-ink screen, sensor for movement (PIR), temperature and humidity sensor, LUX sensor and 3 buttons. The user can change the target temperature and see current indoor conditions.

mclimate/co2-display.name: CO2 Display
mclimate/co2-display.description: MClimate CO2 Display is a stand-alone CO2 sensor powered entirely by solar energy using an organic solar panel. The device features a 2.9" e-ink screen, sensor for movement (PIR), temperature and humidity sensor, LUX sensor and NDIR CO2 sensor.

mclimate/fan-coil-thermostat.name: Fan Coil Thermostat
mclimate/fan-coil-thermostat.description: MClimate Fan Coil Thermostat (FCT) is a thermostat compatible with 2-pipe and 4-pipe Fan Coil Units with 4 SPST relays, 1 DPST dry relay and 0-10V input/output. It features a 4.2" e-ink display, digital temperature and humidity sensor, and 4 buttons.

mclimate/co2-display-lite.name: CO2 Display Lite
mclimate/co2-display-lite.description: MClimate CO2 Display lite LoRaWAN is a stand-alone CO2 sensor powered entirely by solar energy using an organic solar panel. The device features a 1.54" e-ink screen, temperature and humidity sensor, LUX sensor and NDIR CO2 sensor.

mclimate/16aspm.name: 16A Switch & Power Meter (16ASPM)
mclimate/16aspm.description: The МClimate 16A Switch & Power Meter LoRaWAN (16ASPM) is a miniature device that features a wet 16A relay and an electricity meter inside. The device has 4 terminals L, N, N, Lout, connecting and disconnecting Lout from Lin. The device operates in LoRaWAN Class C, features FUOTA (Firmware Upgrades Over The Air) and has overheating protection

mclimate/16ads.name: 16A Dry Switch (16ADS)
mclimate/16ads.description: The МClimate 16ADS is a miniature device that features a 16A dry relay. The device is small enough to fit behind most wall switches and outlets. The device operates in LoRaWAN Class C, features FUOTA (Firmware Upgrades Over The Air) and has overheating protection

milesight-iot/am102.name: Milesight 2-in-1 IAQ Sensor - AM102
milesight-iot/am102.description: AM102(L) is a compact indoor ambience monitoringsensor formeasurement of temperature and humidity. These data will beshownon the E-ink screen in real-time, which allow to quantify theindoorenvironment and comfort

milesight-iot/am102l.name: Milesight 2-in-1 IAQ Sensor - AM102l

milesight-iot/am103.name: Milesight AM103-LoRaWAN Indoor Air Quality Sensor (3 in 1)
milesight-iot/am103.description: Milesight AM103 is a compact indoor ambience monitoring sensor that supports long-lasting battery life, wall-mounted installation, and visual display via an E-ink screen. Meanwhile, AM103L is a more economical model without E-ink screen to meet your various needs. Their built-in NFC lead to easy batch installation. The clean and modern design of AM103 and AM103L is ideal for offices, classrooms, libraries, hospitals, etc.

milesight-iot/am307.name: Milesight AM307-LoRaWAN Indoor Air Quality Sensor (7 in 1)
milesight-iot/am307.description: Milesight AM307 collects various indoor ambience conditions through 7 built-in sensors and delivers the data to the mobile App and its 4.2-inch E-ink screen.
